name: basf-cicd-test-project
description: CI/CD pipeline practice project with Cypress and Newman tests

scripts.test: npm run test:cypress && npm run test:newman
scripts.test:cypress:report: npm run test:cypress || true && npm run report:merge && npm run report:generate
scripts.test:newman: newman run postman/api-collection.json -e postman/environment.json -r cli,htmlextra,junit --reporter-htmlextra-export newman/report.html --reporter-junit-export newman/junit.xml
scripts.report:merge: mochawesome-merge cypress/reports/mochawesome/*.json > cypress/reports/mochawesome/report.json || echo 'No JSON files to merge'
scripts.report:generate: marge cypress/reports/mochawesome/report.json --reportDir cypress/reports/mochawesome --inline || echo 'Report generation skipped'
scripts.docker:test: docker compose up -d && docker compose wait cypress newman && docker compose down

author: BASF Interview Candidate
